sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35774" key="e)nneada/ktulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐννεα-δάκτῠλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n35774.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with nine fingers,</tr_> Ptol.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4040.tlg001:p.147B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Bibl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.147B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
